task: What is my next upcoming event in Simple Calendar Pro? Answer with the title only. If there are multiples titles, format your answer in a comma separated list.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the Android home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another Gmail icon in the dock. The target app, "Simple Calendar Pro", is not visible on this screen.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Check the upcoming events list | Step 3: Extract the title(s) of the next upcoming event(s) and return them.

[Decision]
Since the task requires checking an event in "Simple Calendar Pro" and the app is not visible on the current home screen page, I need to launch it. I will use the system's open app function to start "Simple Calendar Pro" directly.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. Today's date is highlighted with a blue circle on the 15th, which has an event titled "Concert". Other events are visible on various dates throughout the month.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Check the upcoming events list → | Step 3: Extract the title(s) of the next upcoming event(s) and return them.

[Decision]
To find the details of the next upcoming event, I need to view the events for today. The current screen shows the monthly overview, and today is October 15th. I will tap on the cell for October 15th to open the daily view and confirm the event details.

[Memory]
Current date identified as October 15th. Event on this date is "Concert".

[Observation]
The screen shows the daily schedule for October 15 (Sun). There are four events listed: "Catch up on Annual Report" (02:24 - 02:39), "Catch up on Campaign" (03:32 - 03:47), "Appointment for Annual Report" (06:50 - 07:20), and "Concert" (19:00 - 20:00). The current time shown at the top left is 15:34.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Check the upcoming events list ✓ | Step 3: Extract the title(s) of the next upcoming event(s) and return them →

[Decision]
Based on the current time (15:34) and the scheduled events, the events scheduled before 15:34 have already passed (all three morning events). The only event scheduled after the current time is "Concert" at 19:00. Therefore, the next upcoming event is "Concert". I will output this title as the final answer to complete the task.

[Memory]
Current time is 15:34 on Oct 15th. Events before 15:34 are passed. Next upcoming event is "Concert" (19:00). Task is ready to be completed.
